$schema-note: Declarative registry for the single Pages bundle, aggregated by build_site_bundle.py. 'sections' = static site dirs (repo-relative 'source' with an index.html) mounted at /<name>/ — also add the source path to the deploy workflow push triggers. 'links' = homepage nav links only (nothing copied), e.g. the pip index; probe=true shows the link only when its path is reachable (hidden in local previews).
